The '''Kashyyykian black mountain armor''' was a type of battle [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by members of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:P9.2" /> This armor was developed to protect Wookiees from the elements and predators they could encounter when traversing mountainous areas.<ref name="SWGGN8">{{SonyCite|subdomain=www|url=newsletters/swg/newsletter_04_04.html|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies Newsletter #8 - April, 2004}}</ref> It was also often worn by Wookiee [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] tracking small or medium-sized preys.<ref name="SWG:P9.2" /> The Kashyyykian black mountain armor offered protection against kinetic damage as well as from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> The complete armor set comprised a chest plate with an included helmet, left & right biceps, left & right bracers and leggings.<ref name="SWG:P9.2" />

Two other models of Wookiee armors were the Kashyyykian [[Kashyyykian hunting armor|hunting]] and [[Kashyyykian ceremonial armor|ceremonial]] armors.<ref name="SWG:P9.2" />

Kashyyykian black mountain armors were worn by the [[Isolationist Wookiees]].<ref name="SWG:RotW" />

A variant of this armor, the '''Kashyyykian black mountain camouflage armor''', was designed to help Wookiees blend with forest environments.<ref name="SWG:RTP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Rebel Theme Park}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Kashyyykian black mountain armor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:P9.2" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Kashyyykian black mountain armor was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 27 July 04|Publish 9.2]]," released on [[July 27]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 9: Secrets of the Force">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=62675|text=Publish 9: Secrets of the Force}}</ref>
